div.div: Commented on #22 fix: dashboard card links, logout button, and exam-safe delete guard

Both review comments addressed in 48cb3e3. The bulk-delete paths in QCMBuilderPage and QuestionBankPage now aggregate exam usage before deleting:
Added countDependentExamsForMany(ids) on both models returning the distinct exam count (a per-item sum would double-count exams that share questions/QCMs). New IPC getQcmUsageBulk / getQuestionUsageBulk . Both bulk-delete modals fetch the aggregate on open and show a red warning line with the exam count before confirm.
Added 3 unit tests for the distinct-count semantics. 444/444 pass.
Created new branch fix/dashboard-links-logout-delete-guard in moxer-mmh/Project_Pluridisciplinaire_S8
Closed #1431 Flaky CI: test_mock_secret_token_rejected_in_prod not hermetic re MOCK_PAYMENTS
Created new branch agent/backend/GH-1431-hermetic-hs256-test in Logis-Ressources-Inc/LogisHub
